'''Countess''' was a nobility title. [[Anya (Serenno)|Anya]] was the Countess of [[Serenno]]'s [[House Serenno]], while [[House Malvern]]'s [[Hagi]] also held the title.<ref name="TOG">''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story The Official Guide]]''</ref> [[Ursa Wren]], leader of the [[Mandalorian]] [[Clan Wren]], was a countess.<ref name="Legacy of Mandalore" /> [[Alissyndrex delga Cantonica Provincion]] was the Countess of [[Canto Bight]] in [[34 ABY]].<ref name="TLJVD">''[[Star Wars: The Last Jedi: The Visual Dictionary]]''</ref>
